name: /audit-pack: bundles the three freshness sections (Standards Freshness, PR Corpus Freshness, Compliance Freshness) per §2.17
command: mkdir -p compliance && printf '{"standards":"fresh","pr_corpus":"fresh","compliance":"stale-warn-degraded"}' > compliance/freshness.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack.sh" --freshness-file "$PWD/compliance/freshness.json" --emit "$PWD/audit-pack.md" --section freshness && grep "Standards Freshness" audit-pack.md 1>&2 && grep "PR Corpus Freshness" audit-pack.md 1>&2 && grep "Compliance Freshness" audit-pack.md 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
